explainability.path_to_improvement: Document how explanations are provided to users affected by AI decisions.

external_accountability.path_to_improvement: Obtain external validation of AI practices or require vendor certifications.

fairness.path_to_improvement: Document bias testing procedures or vendor AI fairness requirements.

governance.findings: Published materials describe the system's capabilities. These materials also describe the system's learning process for validating correct component assembly.
governance.path_to_improvement: Document AI governance structure, including oversight of vendor AI tools.

relevant_sources.summary: This press release provides evidence for the **governance** and **transparency** pillars of responsible AI. It supports transparency by explicitly mentioning the "Augmented AI solution" and "AI visual inspection solution," detailing the technology and its application. Furthermore, the press release touches on governance by describing the system's capabilities and its learning process for validating correct component assembly.
relevant_sources.title: QualiSense wins EIT BoostUp! Europe 2023 award as Dana Incorporated chooses Augmented AI platform

oversight.path_to_improvement: Document human review processes for AI-assisted decisions (built or vendor AI).

privacy.path_to_improvement: Document data protection practices for AI systems, including vendor AI data handling.

transparency.findings: Published materials explicitly mention the 'Augmented AI solution' and 'AI visual inspection solution'. These materials detail the technology and its application.
transparency.path_to_improvement: Document AI systems in use, including vendor/third-party AI tools.

relevant_sources.summary: This press release provides evidence for the **governance** and **transparency** pillars of responsible AI. It supports transparency by explicitly mentioning the "Augmented AI solution" and "AI visual inspection solution," detailing the technology and its application. Furthermore, the press release touches on governance by describing the system's capabilities and its learning process for validating correct component assembly.
relevant_sources.title: QualiSense wins EIT BoostUp! Europe 2023 award as Dana Incorporated chooses Augmented AI platform

summary.overall_findings: Dana's public documentation was reviewed across 7 responsible AI pillars, and no qualifying evidence was identified. While the assessment reviewed 8 publicly available sources, no documented AI governance, oversight, or accountability practices were found.
